title: CHILD CARE RESOURCE AND REFERRAL - 211info
text: EASTERN OREGON CHILD CARE RESOURCES CHILD CARE RESOURCE AND REFERRAL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides training, advocacy, safety and technical assistance, consultation, and resources for child care providers. Actively recruits child care providers to register as a part of the statewide system of child care providers, and manages provider information for referrals to families in FIND CHILD CARE OREGON (FCCO). Also provides information and consulting to employers about employer-sponsored care and other child care issues. 363 A Street W Vale, OR 97918 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Typically Monday-Friday, but hours vary. Call for information. Email (458) 214-0497 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 203-0357 Main phone Baker County CCR&R (458) 214-0497 [email protected] Malheur County CCR&R (541) 709-5930 [email protected] Wallowa County CCR&R (541) 203-0339 [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Varies by training DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Baker, Malheur, and Wallowa Counties Services: Child Care Provider Recruitment Child Care Provider Training Emergency Management Organization Complaints * Child Care Issues If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. EASTERN OREGON CHILD CARE RESOURCES
